Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Continued To Jan-06-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 210

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses, Request For Monetary Snactions
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Ashwin Ladva's Motion To Compel Response To 1. Special Interrogatories, Set Eight; 2. Request For Production Of Documents, Set 5; 3. Admissions, Set 7; To Have Plaintiff Provide Verifications To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions
There being no opposition on file, defendant's motion to compel response to 1. special interrogatories, set eight; 2. request for production of documents, set 5; 3. admissions, set 7; to have plaintiff provide verifications to discovery and request for monetary sanctions is granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Within seven days of notice of entry of this order, plaintiff shall serve full, compete and verified response to the subject discovery requests;
3. Sanctions shall issue against plaintiff in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
